name: BME680 Temperature+Pressure+Humidity+Gas Sensor via BSEC
description: The `bme680_bsec` sensor platform allows you to use your BME680 ([datasheet](https://www.bosch-sensortec.com/media/boschsensortec/downloads/datasheets/bst-bme680-ds001.pdf), [Adafruit](https://www.adafruit.com/product/3660), [Pimoroni](https://shop.pimoroni.com/products/bme680-breakout)) temperature, pressure and humidity and gas sensors with ESPHome via the Bosch Sensortec Environmental Cluster (BSEC) software library. The use of Bosch's proprietary algorithms provide an Index for Air Quality (IAQ) measurement derived from the gas resistance sensor's response to specific Volatile Organic Compounds (VOC). The BSEC software also provides estimated values for CO₂ and Breath Volatile Organic Compounds (b-VOC) using a correlation between VOC and CO₂ in a human's exhaled breath.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: Manually specify the I²C address of the sensor. Defaults to `0x76`. Another address can be `0x77`.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation. Use this ID in the sensor section to refer to the correct BME680 if you have more than one device. This will also be used to refer to the calibrated BSEC algorithm state saved to flash.

config_entries.label: Iaq Mode
config_entries.description: IAQ calculation mode. Default is `static` for static applications (e.g. fixed indoor devices). Can be `mobile` for mobile applications (e.g. carry-on devices).

config_entries.label: Sample Rate
config_entries.description: Sample rate. Default is `lp` for low power consumption, sampling every 3 seconds. Can be `ulp` for ultra-low power, sampling every 5 minutes. This controls the sampling rate for gas-dependent sensors and will govern the interval at which the sensor heater is operated. By default, this rate will also be used for temperature, pressure, and humidity sensors but these can be overridden on a per-sensor level if required.

config_entries.label: State Save Interval
config_entries.description: The minimum interval at which to save calibrated BSEC algorithm state to flash so that calibration doesn't have to start from zero on device restart. Defaults to `6h`.

config_entries.label: Supply Voltage
config_entries.description: Supply voltage of the sensor. Default is `3.3V`. Can be set to `1.8V` if your sensor is 1.8V-powered (e.g. the Pimoroni PIM357 BME680 Breakout module).

config_entries.label: Temperature Offset
config_entries.description: Temperature offset if device is in enclosure and reads too high. This value is subtracted from the reading (e.g. if the sensor reads 5°C higher than expected, set this to `5`  ) and also corrects the relative humidity readings. Defaults to `0`.
